html:
Exclusive to:
See also: Weight

The Produce Scale is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted at an Alchemy Engine with four Boards and four Cut Grass.

Players can submit a Vegetable to the Produce Scale to display its Weight. All vegetables can be placed, but only Giant Vegetables have a weight. If the new vegetable is heavier than the current vegetable, the new vegetable takes its place and the old one is dropped next to the Produce Scale. Examining the Produce Scale also tells the day of the vegetable's harvest. Vegetables placed on the Produce Scale have their rot timer paused. Vegetables preserved with Beeswax cannot be placed on the Produce Scale.

In addition to this, if the player sets their own personal record by a giant vegetable on the scale, it will show it in the Compendium in the form of a photograph. It will show the player's character posing beside it wearing whatever skin they were wearing at the time of harvest.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Elegant
Decorator's Collection
Fieldflower Farm Scale
This hardy bloom is ready to weigh all your farm-fresh veggies.

Trivia

  • The Produce Scale was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.

Models in the game

  • Burnt

Exclusive to:

“I can scientifically measure my harvest's heftiness.”
–Wilson
“Oooh, that basket looks flammable!”
–Willow
“Whose fruit or veggie will be mightiest?”
–Wolfgang
“A fleeting distraction from our pitiable lives.”
–Wendy
“WHAT IS THIS HUMAN OBSESSION WITH WEIGHING EVERYTHING?”
–WX-78
“I suppose I must put my gardening prowess to the test!”
–Wickerbottom
“We're up for a bit of friendly competition, aren't we Lucy?”
–Woodie
“Do we not have infinitely more pressing things to do?”
–Maxwell
“Vile veggies! Bring öut the best amöng yöu tö be judged!”
–Wigfrid
“We used to see these at the fair!”
–Webber
“Ah, a handy kitchen scale!”
–Warly
“Friend holder”
–Wormwood
“What is this, a county fair?”
–Winona
“Hoohoo, a game!”
–Wortox
“Mine gonna win!”
–Wurt
“Is there a badge for growing the biggest vegetable?”
–Walter
“You would think weight would be easier to manipulate than time...”
–Wanda
The Produce Scale is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them. It is crafted at an Alchemy Engine with four Boards and four Cut Grass.
Players can submit a Vegetable to the Produce Scale to display its Weight. All vegetables can be placed, but only Giant Vegetables have a weight. If the new vegetable is heavier than the current vegetable, the new vegetable takes its place and the old one is dropped next to the Produce Scale. Examining the Produce Scale also tells the day of the vegetable's harvest. Vegetables placed on the Produce Scale have their rot timer paused. Vegetables preserved with Beeswax cannot be placed on the Produce Scale.
In addition to this, if the player sets their own personal record by a giant vegetable on the scale, it will show it in the Compendium in the form of a photograph. It will show the player's character posing beside it wearing whatever skin they were wearing at the time of harvest.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quy Mô Sản Xuất là một cấu trúc độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được chế tạo tại Máy luyện kim với bốn Ván và bốn Cỏ Cắt.

Bring öut the best amöng yöu tö be judged! |webber = We used to see these at the fair! |winona = What is this, a county fair? |warly = Ah, a handy kitchen scale! |wortox = Hoohoo, a game! |wormwood = Friend holder |wurt = Mine gonna win! |walter = Is there a badge for growing the biggest vegetable? |wanda = You would think weight would be easier to manipulate than time... |choose = wolfgang}} The '''Produce Scale''' is a [[structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is crafted at an [[Alchemy Engine]] with four [[Boards]] and four [[Cut Grass]]. Players can submit a [[Vegetable]] to the Produce Scale to display its [[Weight]]. All vegetables can be placed, but only [[Giant Vegetables]] have a weight. If the new vegetable is heavier than the current vegetable, the new vegetable takes its place and the old one is dropped next to the Produce Scale. Examining the Produce Scale also tells the day of the vegetable's harvest. Vegetables placed on the Produce Scale have their rot timer paused. Vegetables preserved with [[Beeswax]] cannot be placed on the Produce Scale. In addition to this, if the player sets their own personal record by a giant vegetable on the scale, it will show it in the [[Compendium]] in the form of a photograph. It will show the player's [[Characters|character]] posing beside it wearing whatever [[Skins|skin]] they were wearing at the time of harvest. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Structure Skins|Belongings}}
